title: Zingy Tomato Soup
description: A simple and delicious soup made with fresh tomatoes and zing, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until the onion is translucent.
Add the tomatoes and zing, and stir well.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
